metadata.description: Batch 36 — additional Oxford 5000 words 501-600; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: to publicly criticize or accuse strongly
words.example: The policy denounces unsafe behavior.

words.definitionEn: closely packed together
words.example: A dense layer of frost blocked the view.

words.definitionEn: the amount of mass or people in a given space
words.definitionTh: ความหนาแน่น
words.example: Measure the product density.

words.definitionEn: to leave a place, especially on a journey
words.definitionTh: ออกเดินทาง
words.example: The shipment will depart at noon.

words.definitionEn: the state of relying on someone or something
words.example: Reduce dependence on manual inspection.

words.definitionEn: requiring support from something else
words.definitionTh: ขึ้นอยู่กับ
words.example: Accuracy is dependent on stable lighting.

words.definitionEn: to show or describe in a picture or words
words.example: The diagram depicts the inspection flow.

words.definitionEn: to position people or equipment for use
words.definitionTh: นำไปใช้ / จัดกำลัง
words.example: Deploy the model to the production server.

words.definitionEn: the act of putting resources into position
words.definitionTh: การนำไปใช้
words.example: The deployment starts after validation.

words.definitionEn: money placed in an account; to place money or material
words.definitionTh: เงินฝาก / ฝาก
words.example: Ice formed a deposit on the lens.

words.definitionEn: a medical condition of persistent sadness or an economic decline
words.definitionTh: ภาวะซึมเศร้า / การตกต่ำ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “depression”.

words.definitionEn: to prevent someone from having something
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “deprive”.

words.definitionEn: a person appointed as second in command
words.definitionTh: รอง / ผู้แทน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “deputy”.

words.definitionEn: to obtain or develop from a source
words.definitionTh: ได้รับมาจาก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “derive”.

words.definitionEn: to move downward
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “descend”.

words.definitionEn: the act of moving downward
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “descent”.

words.definitionEn: to officially choose or name for a role
words.definitionTh: กำหนด / แต่งตั้ง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “designate”.

words.definitionEn: worth having or wanting
words.definitionTh: เป็นที่พึงปรารถนา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “desirable”.

words.definitionEn: the main screen or workspace of a computer
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “desktop”.

words.definitionEn: in a way showing very little hope
words.definitionTh: อย่างสิ้นหวัง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “desperately”.

words.definitionEn: the act of destroying something
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “destruction”.

words.definitionEn: causing great damage
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “destructive”.

words.definitionEn: to keep someone in official custody
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “detain”.

words.definitionEn: the act of discovering or noticing something
words.definitionTh: การตรวจจับ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “detection”.

words.definitionEn: the state of being held in custody
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “detention”.

words.definitionEn: to become worse over time
words.example: Image quality may deteriorate over time.

words.definitionEn: firm intention to achieve something
words.definitionTh: ความมุ่งมั่น
words.example: The team showed strong determination.

words.definitionEn: to cause severe damage or emotional shock
words.definitionTh: ทำลายล้างอย่างหนัก
words.example: A major failure could devastate production.

words.definitionEn: an evil spirit in stories or religion
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “devil”.

words.definitionEn: to invent a plan or method
words.example: Engineers devised a new bracket.

words.definitionEn: to give time or effort fully to a purpose
words.example: Devote enough time to validation.

words.definitionEn: to identify an illness or problem
words.example: Use the log to diagnose the fault.

words.definitionEn: the identification of an illness or problem
words.definitionTh: การวินิจฉัย
words.example: The technician confirmed the diagnosis.

words.definitionEn: to give orders in an authoritative way
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “dictate”.

words.definitionEn: a ruler with total power
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “dictator”.

words.definitionEn: to be unlike or vary
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “differ”.

words.definitionEn: to recognize or show differences
words.example: The camera differentiates good and defective parts.

words.definitionEn: the quality of being worthy of respect
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “dignity”.

words.definitionEn: a difficult choice between alternatives
words.definitionTh: ภาวะกลืนไม่เข้าคายไม่ออก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “dilemma”.

words.definitionEn: a coin worth ten cents
words.definitionTh: เหรียญสิบเซนต์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “dime”.

words.definitionEn: a measurable aspect or size
words.example: Check every critical dimension.

words.definitionEn: to become smaller or less important
words.example: The signal may diminish with distance.

words.definitionEn: to put briefly into liquid or decrease sharply
words.definitionTh: จุ่ม / ลดลง
words.example: The temperature dipped below the limit.

words.definitionEn: a person representing a country abroad
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “diplomat”.

words.definitionEn: relating to relations between countries
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “diplomatic”.

words.definitionEn: an organized list of names or files
words.example: Save the file in the project directory.

words.definitionEn: a condition limiting physical or mental ability
words.example: The interface should support users with a disability.

words.definitionEn: having a physical or mental condition limiting activities
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “disabled”.

words.definitionEn: a difference of opinion
words.definitionTh: ความไม่เห็นด้วย
words.example: The teams resolved the disagreement.

words.definitionEn: to fail to meet expectations
words.definitionTh: ทำให้ผิดหวัง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “disappoint”.

words.definitionEn: the feeling caused by unmet expectations
words.definitionTh: ความผิดหวัง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “disappointment”.

words.definitionEn: causing great damage or failure
words.example: A wrong setting could have disastrous results.

words.definitionEn: to throw away or stop using
words.definitionTh: ทิ้ง / ละทิ้ง
words.example: Discard the damaged sample.

words.definitionEn: to release, remove, or allow someone to leave
words.definitionTh: ปล่อย / จำหน่าย
words.example: The valve discharges excess pressure.

words.definitionEn: to make secret information known
words.example: Do not disclose confidential data.

words.definitionEn: the act of revealing information
words.definitionTh: การเปิดเผย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “disclosure”.

words.definitionEn: to make someone less willing to act
words.definitionTh: ทำให้ท้อใจ
words.example: Complex forms discourage reporting.

words.definitionEn: formal discussion or written communication
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “discourse”.

words.definitionEn: careful freedom to decide what to do
words.example: Use professional discretion when escalating.

words.definitionEn: unfair treatment based on group characteristics
words.definitionTh: การเลือกปฏิบัติ
words.example: The policy prohibits discrimination.

words.definitionEn: the act of removing someone from a job
words.definitionTh: การเลิกจ้าง
words.example: Serious misconduct may lead to dismissal.

words.definitionEn: a condition that disrupts normal function
words.definitionTh: ความผิดปกติ
words.example: The inspection detected a structural disorder.

words.definitionEn: to force someone or something to move
words.example: Vibration may displace the sensor.

words.definitionEn: the act of getting rid of something
words.example: Follow the approved waste disposal method.

words.definitionEn: to get rid of something
words.example: Dispose of rejected material correctly.

words.definitionEn: a serious disagreement; to argue about something
words.definitionTh: ข้อพิพาท / โต้แย้ง
words.example: The evidence helped resolve the dispute.

words.definitionEn: to interrupt normal activity
words.example: Network loss can disrupt inspection.

words.definitionEn: an interruption that prevents normal operation
words.definitionTh: การหยุดชะงัก
words.example: The upgrade caused minimal disruption.

words.definitionEn: to become liquid or formally end
words.example: The powder dissolves in water.

words.definitionEn: far away in space or relationship
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “distant”.

words.definitionEn: clearly different from something else
words.definitionTh: แตกต่างชัดเจน
words.example: The defect has a distinct pattern.

words.definitionEn: a clear difference between things
words.definitionTh: ความแตกต่าง
words.example: The model makes a clear distinction.

words.definitionEn: having a special quality that makes it recognizable
words.example: The product has a distinctive mark.

words.definitionEn: to recognize the difference between things
words.example: The model distinguishes wood from ice cream.

words.definitionEn: to change the true shape, sound, or meaning
words.example: Reflections can distort the image.

words.definitionEn: to take attention away from something
words.definitionTh: ทำให้เสียสมาธิ
words.example: Noise may distract the operator.

words.definitionEn: extreme worry or suffering; to cause it
words.definitionTh: ความทุกข์ / ทำให้ทุกข์
words.example: The alarm signal indicates distress.

words.definitionEn: to interrupt comfort or normal activity
words.example: Do not disturb the camera alignment.

words.definitionEn: causing worry or concern
words.example: The trend shows a disturbing increase.

words.definitionEn: to move quickly into water; a jump into water
words.example: The engineer dived into the data.

words.definitionEn: including many different kinds
words.example: Test the model on diverse products.

words.definitionEn: the presence of many different types
words.definitionTh: ความหลากหลาย
words.example: Data diversity improves model robustness.

words.definitionEn: to change direction or redirect
words.example: The gate diverts rejected products.

words.definitionEn: relating to a god or sacred power
words.definitionTh: ศักดิ์สิทธิ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “divine”.

words.definitionEn: the legal ending of a marriage; to end a marriage
words.definitionTh: การหย่า / หย่า
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “divorce”.

words.definitionEn: a set of beliefs taught by a group
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “doctrine”.

words.definitionEn: written material explaining a system or process
words.definitionTh: เอกสารประกอบ
words.example: Update the technical documentation.

words.definitionEn: an area of knowledge or control
words.example: The application belongs to the quality domain.

words.definitionEn: the state of having greater power or influence
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “dominance”.

words.definitionEn: more powerful or important than others
words.example: Lighting was the dominant factor.

words.definitionEn: money or goods given to help
words.example: The company made a donation.

words.definitionEn: a person who gives money, blood, or organs
words.example: Each donor received a receipt.

words.definitionEn: a measured amount of medicine
words.example: Measure the correct chemical dose.

words.definitionEn: a very small round mark
words.example: The image contains a small red dot.

words.definitionEn: to remove liquid from something
words.example: Drain the tank before maintenance.

words.definitionEn: in a sudden and noticeable way
words.example: Accuracy improved dramatically.

words.definitionEn: to move slowly without control
words.example: Sensor values may drift over time.

words.definitionEn: providing the main force or motivation
words.definitionTh: ขับเคลื่อน
words.example: Cost reduction is a driving factor.

words.definitionEn: a long period with little or no rain
words.example: The region experienced a severe drought.

words.definitionEn: to die from being unable to breathe underwater
words.example: Never enter deep water without protection.
